command: playwright test --reporter=line,json --workers=2 (owned loopback server; retained aggregate copied from test-artifacts/e2e-20260713-111518/results.json)

intentionalSkipGroups.reason: The mobile-navigation Escape test runs only in the two mobile projects.
The mobile learning-navigation smoke test runs only in the two mobile projects.
Formal programming exam navigation intentionally requires desktop or tablet and is excluded from the two mobile projects.
The admin operations table and two dense lesson-workspace tests are covered at desktop/tablet widths and excluded from the two mobile projects.

environmentNotes: The restricted Windows process sandbox prevented Firefox from launching its tab subprocess (before page creation). The approved final matrix ran outside that process restriction and passed Firefox with zero failures.
Safari projects use Playwright WebKit and device emulation; they do not replace physical iPad/iPhone manual verification.
